name: github-project-manager
description: Manage GitHub Projects safely through the gh CLI with readiness checks and dry-run status updates.

interface.shortDescription: Manage GitHub Projects safely with the gh CLI.
interface.longDescription: GitHub Project Manager helps Codex inspect GitHub Projects, list fields and items, add issues or pull requests, and safely update Status or other single-select fields using the authenticated gh CLI. It checks project readiness and defaults status changes to dry-run before applying mutations.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $github-project-manager to inspect this GitHub Project, preview item status changes, and apply them only after dry-run verification.
